summary.en: Eritrea's grid context should be treated as a project-specific approval issue with the Eritrean Electricity Corporation (EEC), the state electricity utility. The practical low-voltage assumption is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, but Eritrea has very low electrification and isolated grid conditions, so site supply capacity, earthing, metering, voltage tolerance, harmonic limits, and commissioning acceptance must be confirmed for each installation. Because the market is nascent and public EV charging is essentially non-existent, no confirmed EVSE-specific national grid-code route should be assumed.
summary.zh: 厄立特里亚电网环境应作为项目级审批事项，与国有电力公用事业机构厄立特里亚电力公司（EEC）确认。实务上可按230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz作为低压假设，但厄立特里亚电气化率很低且电网相对孤立，因此每个安装项目均须确认现场供电容量、接地、计量、电压容差、谐波限值和调试验收。由于市场处于萌芽阶段且公共电动汽车充电基本不存在，不应假定存在已确认的电动汽车充电设备专用国家并网路径。
summary.zht: 厄利垂亞電網環境應作為項目級審批事項，與國有電力公用事業機構厄利垂亞電力公司（EEC）確認。實務上可按230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz作為低壓假設，但厄利垂亞電氣化率很低且電網相對孤立，因此每個安裝項目均須確認現場供電容量、接地、計量、電壓容差、諧波限值和調試驗收。由於市場處於萌芽階段且公共電動汽車充電基本不存在，不應假定存在已確認的電動汽車充電設備專用國家併網路徑。

standards_or_laws: Eritrean Electricity Corporation (EEC) project connection and utility acceptance requirements
IEC 60038 — IEC standard voltages, including 230/400 V low-voltage systems
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility, harmonics, flicker and power-quality evidence where specified

summary.en: China domestic EV charger installations are commonly designed around 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz, GB/T 18487.1-2023 safety requirements, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China and Eritrea share 50 Hz frequency, but Eritrea's 230/400 V nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline and requires input-voltage range, protection threshold, metering, transformer, rectifier, and thermal validation.
summary.zh: 中国国内电动汽车充电桩安装通常围绕220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，GB/T 18487.1-2023安全要求、GB/T 20234接口、GB/T 27930-2023直流通信及当地电网运营商验收设计。中国与厄立特里亚同为50 Hz，但厄立特里亚230/400 V标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线，需要确认输入电压范围、保护阈值、计量、变压器、整流器和热设计。
summary.zht: 中國國內電動汽車充電樁安裝通常圍繞220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，GB/T 18487.1-2023安全要求、GB/T 20234接口、GB/T 27930-2023直流通訊及當地電網運營商驗收設計。中國與厄利垂亞同為50 Hz，但厄利垂亞230/400 V標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線，需要確認輸入電壓範圍、保護閾值、計量、變壓器、整流器和熱設計。

standards_or_laws: China domestic 220/380 V, 50 Hz grid design baseline

gap.en: The main grid gap is not frequency but voltage and site readiness. Exporters should document operation at 230/400 V, 50 Hz; confirm voltage tolerance and protection settings; prepare harmonic and EMC data under IEC 61000 where requested; assess weak-grid behaviour, earthing, surge protection, backup power, and metering; and obtain EEC or authority acceptance before shipment. China-only 220/380 V assumptions are not sufficient for Eritrea.
gap.zh: 主要电网差距不是频率，而是电压和现场可用性。出口商应记录设备在230/400 V、50 Hz下运行；确认电压容差和保护设定；按要求准备IEC 61000谐波及EMC数据；评估弱电网行为、接地、浪涌保护、备用电源和计量；并在出货前取得EEC或主管机构认可。仅按中国220/380 V假设不足以适用于厄立特里亚。
gap.zht: 主要電網差距不是頻率，而是電壓和現場可用性。出口商應記錄設備在230/400 V、50 Hz下運行；確認電壓容差和保護設定；按要求準備IEC 61000諧波及EMC數據；評估弱電網行為、接地、浪湧保護、備用電源和計量；並在出貨前取得EEC或主管機構認可。僅按中國220/380 V假設不足以適用於厄利垂亞。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific — confirm EEC or responsible authority connection acceptance; no confirmed EVSE-specific national grid code identified
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic grid acceptance and 220/380 V design assumptions do not substitute for Eritrea 230/400 V project validation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Eritrea as a project-validated 230/400 V, 50 Hz deployment, not as a China 220/380 V copy. Confirm site capacity, voltage tolerance, earthing, EMC and harmonic limits, and EEC acceptance before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将厄立特里亚视为需按项目验证的230/400 V、50 Hz部署，而不是中国220/380 V配置的复制。出货或调试前应确认现场容量、电压容差、接地、EMC和谐波限值以及EEC认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將厄利垂亞視為需按項目驗證的230/400 V、50 Hz部署，而不是中國220/380 V配置的複製。出貨或調試前應確認現場容量、電壓容差、接地、EMC和諧波限值以及EEC認可。
